system.description:
The psyker explores multiple outcomes and chooses the safest course. On a successful Focus Power Test, gains +20 to all WS and BS Tests; BS Tests against him suffer –30. Can warn comrades within 5m × Psy Rating — BS attacks against them suffer –10. Allies beyond this range are outside the scope of his foresight. Cannot be used at Fettered Psychic Strength.

Focus Power Test: Psyniscience

Prerequisites: Divining the Future

XP Cost: 300
